question:
Bitcoin ETF approved by Jan 15?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if any spot Bitcoin ETF receives approval from the SEC by January 15, 2024, 11:59:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from the SEC, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

evidences.title: [PDF] SR-NASDAQ-2023-019 Amendment 1 - SEC.gov
evidences.content: Act Not applicable. 11. Exhibits 1. Notice of proposed rule change for publication in the Federal Register. SR-NASDAQ-2023-019 Amendment No.1 Page 50 of 97 EXHIBIT 1 SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION (Release No. ; File No. SR-NASDAQ-2023-019 A-1) January__, 2024 Self-Regulatory Organizations; The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change to List and Trade Shares of the Valkyrie Bitcoin Fund Under Nasdaq Rule 5711(d) Pursuant to Section 19(b)(1) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (“Act”)1, and Rule 19b-4 thereunder,2 notice is hereby given that on January 5, 2024, The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (“Nasdaq” or “Exchange”) filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (“SEC” or “Commission”) the proposed rule change as described in Items I, II, and III, below,
